metadata.baseline_comparability: guided, random, and grid share budget, theta generator, evaluator, oracle, and validity gate
metadata.fitness: quality is max classical-minus-raptor rho gap over valid target properties; catastrophic P1/P2 target fitness additionally requires decontaminated classical severity S0; strict differential requires neural rho <= -rho jitter reproduction margin; relative degradation differential requires neural rho > 0 and gap beyond that margin; primary_bug is reserved for decontaminated classical S0 versus raptor S3 severity
metadata.single_eval_failure_policy: record returncode/error and continue to the next eval
